author: gb9t
content: Iter 74 result: drivers/md/raid1.md (md raid1 - raid1.c ~3516 lines; pure mirroring + per-bio multi-mirror submission + per-r1_bio remaining count + read_balance heuristics + write-mostly disks + write-behind buffers + bitmap intent log for fast power-loss resync + narrow_write_error per-sector recovery + barrier-bucket per-bucket nr_pending) + virt/kvm/x86-x2apic.md (x2APIC mode virtualization - in lapic.c ~300-400 lines; 32-bit APIC IDs + MSR-based access (0x800-0x83F) + APICBASE.EXTD mode + ICR with 32-bit dest_id + cluster mode + SELF_IPI MSR + VMX virtualize-x2apic-mode pass-through + IOMMU-IR coupling + 256+ vCPU support). 98 Tier-3s total. Next iter: drivers/md/raid5.md (RAID-5/6 parity with stripe-cache) + virt/kvm/x86-vmx-vpid.md (per-VM VPID TLB tagging).
